paper_scale_contract.node_definition: one complete candidate training pipeline, not a small hyperparameter tweak

mcts_contract.scale_requirement: A paper-scale K562 run should be configured for 600+ budget nodes unless explicitly labeled pilot/smoke.

blueprint_families.role: benchmark scaffold and optional external wrappers
embedding, adapter, LoRA, selective and full fine-tuning
cell/expression encoder when real artifacts are present
graph embedding, frozen cache, fine-tune, K-hop attention, smoothing
Reactome/pathway pooling and regulatory networks when acquired
weighted CE, focal loss, layerwise LR, SWA/checkpoint ensemble

when_selected: implement node-local model.py or config-only patch

status_taxonomy.planned: selectable; Codex must implement on demand before training
status_taxonomy.blocked_missing_artifact: must acquire artifact or stop; no fallback training
